$description: Semantic motion tokens alias to motion.json primitives. DTCG-native easing stays in motion-easing.json (CSS-only).

fast.$description: 150ms — use for micro-interactions (toggles, focus rings). Full CSS: var(--motion-duration-fast)ms ease-in-out

base.$description: 250ms — default for most component state changes

slow.$description: 350ms — for larger, more prominent transitions (modals, drawers)
